title: docs: fix error example
body:
Fix the following error example:
```
➜  /data sudo buildah from imagename --signature-policy /etc/containers/policy.json
too many arguments specified
```

Signed-off-by: Zhou Hao <zhouhao@cn.fujitsu.com>

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

@q384566678 thanks for fixing that. However there are other markdown files that have this problem (such as `docs/buildah-run.md`). Would you mind fixing them as well?

Thanks
@q384566678 Thanks for the touch ups and LGTM!

:pushpin: Commit 33e2bc8 has been approved by `rhatdan`

Not sure what is going on with Homu, manually merging.
According to @ripcurld's suggestion, I modified `docs/buildah-run.md`. PTAL.
@q384566678 LGTM and TYVM!  We have happy green test buttons, so I'm going to merge this on in.
